title: AgentTeams Model-Routing Contract (framework-neutral, opt-in)
description: Per-agent tier-role assignment emitted ONLY when --cost-routing is passed. Framework-neutral: tier roles, not model strings (the runtime/adapter resolves a role to a concrete model). Generator-owned; excluded from drift by construction (never in output_files_map/template_hashes/file_hashes; .json so the .md snapshot suite is unaffected).

artifact_type.description: Top-level discriminator (NOT schema_version) so build-log readers never treat this as a baseline.
